nodes.label: requirements.md
nodes.rationale: Establishes baseline toolchain versions including Java 17, Kotlin 2.3.20, Gradle 8.14.3, Android API 36, and major KMP and Firebase library targets.

nodes.label: PRODUCT.md
nodes.rationale: Defines target demographic of independent university students, outlining a premium design persona to avoid generic templates and emphasize visibility and control.

nodes.label: Mobile Cinema OLED Aesthetic
nodes.rationale: Pure black backgrounds (#0C0A09) to minimize light emission and Lucid Gold (#A16207) as a precious accent color.

nodes.label: Lucid Glass Component Style
nodes.rationale: Frosted glass style using semi-transparent overlays (8% white opacity, 15% white border) for depth on dark background.

nodes.label: Lucid Gold Color Scheme
nodes.rationale: Accent color (#A16207) used for primary CTAs and emphasis.

nodes.label: Deep OLED Black Theme
nodes.rationale: OLED first dark mode aesthetic prioritizing nighttime utility and battery efficiency.

nodes.label: Clean Architecture Layout
nodes.rationale: Separation into shared (domain, data, di) and UI modules for kotlin multiplatform design.

nodes.label: Location-Based Reminders System
nodes.rationale: Local-first reminders backed by SQLDelight database, Play Services Geofencing, and WorkManager fallback.
